maps.title: MAP: Corporate Governance Framework — Authorisation Control
maps.objective: To establish authorised procedures for all applicable Governance requirements relating to 'Corporate Governance Framework', thereby enabling the institution to demonstrate full regulatory adherence and reduce Compliance Risk exposure.

tasks.title: Assess current state against: Corporate Governance Framework — Authorisation Control
tasks.description: Conduct a current-state gap assessment to determine the extent to which the organisation currently satisfies the requirement for 'Corporate Governance Framework — Authorisation Control'. Document the existing Procedure posture, identify gaps, and record findings as a Gap Assessment Report.
tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes: Review control description:

tasks.title: Implement technical control: Corporate Governance Framework — Authorisation Control
tasks.description: Execute the technical implementation as specified: Implement operational procedure to. Configuration changes must be applied on all applicable systems in the environment (development, staging, and production). All changes must be tracked in the Change Management Register with a Change Ticket.
tasks.expected_evidence: Change Management Record with system configuration screenshot or export
tasks.implementation_notes: Before applying, take a baseline snapshot of current configuration. Apply change during a pre-approved maintenance window.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Corporate Governance Framework — Authori
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Corporate Governance Framework — Authorisation Control'. Required evidence types: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP). Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP)
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Corporate Governance Framework — Au
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Corporate Governance Framework — Authorisation Control' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. Verification method: Manual Audit. Internal Audit must NOT rely solely on evidence submitted by the implementing department. Perform independent spot-checks or automated configuration queries. Issue an Audit Verification Certificate upon satisfactory completion.
tasks.expected_evidence: Independent Audit Verification Certificate signed by Chief Audit Officer
tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Corporate Governance Framework
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Corporate Governance Framework — Authorisation Control'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.
tasks.deliverable: Signed Compliance Attestation and Updated Compliance Register
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.
